rows.name: Connecticut Medical Examining Board
rows.authority: Governor's Office via DAS Statewide HR
rows.mandate: Licenses and disciplines Connecticut physicians. Twenty-one governor-appointed members — thirteen physicians, one physician assistant, seven public members (CGS § 20-8a).
rows.criticalNote: DPH roster listed 2 vacancies at last review — apply via DAS

rows.name: Connecticut State Board of Education
rows.authority: Governor's Office via DAS Statewide HR
rows.mandate: Oversees Connecticut's public elementary and secondary education. Fourteen members — nine governor-appointed voting members, three ex officio, two student members (CGS § 10-1).

rows.name: Connecticut Council on Developmental Disabilities
rows.authority: Governor's Office via DAS Statewide HR
rows.mandate: Federally mandated DD Council advocating for Connecticut residents with developmental disabilities. Twenty-four governor-appointed members.
rows.criticalNote: Inventory listing — CT publishes no central vacancy list
